summary:
Fixed the durability bug in `server.go` by adding synchronous `Sync()` after `Append()` in the SET handler (lines 81-84) and making `writeSyncOffset` return an error for better reliability (lines 115-122).

Test run shows: summary: 50 OK, 0 LOST out of 50 acked (success, though test.sh grep logic matches "LOST" in "0 LOST").
